项目定位: 本仓库：数字分身 NestJS 后端（api/v1），没有独立前端（Web/小程序/管理台需另项目联调）。
整体：后端能力已较完整，未到「产品可上线」——平台真实对接、流水线闭环、观测与测试仍要补。

已具备（可继续开发的基础）.数据层: 实体与迁移在演进中；当前 migrations/ 下 5 个迁移（文档里写的「3 个」已过时）。
已具备（可继续开发的基础）.文档与调试: Swagger UI：非生产环境 http://localhost:<PORT>/api-docs（main.ts 已挂载）。
已具备（可继续开发的基础）.用户侧 API: 已有 UserController：GET/PUT users/me、PUT users/settings（文档里「无 UserController」已过时）。

仍偏「未完成 / 待验证」的块: 平台：企微已有回调/Connector；抖音等仍为 mock，真实授权与消息链路需对接与联调。
闭环：风格分析（Bull → MinIO → Qdrant → AI）、入站 → 路由 → 生成回复 → 审核 → 回发平台需按环境逐项跑通并加固异常/重试。
短信：接口在，真实短信与防刷多半仍待落地。
工程化：Prometheus/链路追踪/Sentry、E2E 关键路径与单测覆盖率——文档仍列为缺口。
前端：不在本仓库，排期上属于后续对接。
projectOverview:
# Project Overview

Project: Digital Twin Backend (数字分身后端)

Purpose:
- Backend for automating social-platform message handling: learn user chat style, route inbound messages, generate AI replies (with optional human review), send via platform connectors.
- This repo is API-only (NestJS modular monolith). No Next.js / no frontend; clients (mini-program, Web, admin) are separate repos.

Tech Stack:
- NestJS 11 + TypeScript (strict)
- TypeORM + PostgreSQL
- Redis + BullMQ (async jobs: style analysis, reply generation, exports)
- MinIO (S3-compatible object storage)
- Qdrant (vector store for style retrieval)
- Anthropic Claude SDK (reply / style pipeline)
- JWT (Passport) + class-validator + Swagger (OpenAPI)
- Socket.io (WebSocket gateway for notifications)
- Winston logging, Jest + supertest

Main Modules (NestJS feature modules under src/):
- auth — register/login/refresh, JWT
- user — profile & settings (users/me, users/settings)
- style — chat upload, style tasks, profiles, vector store
- reply — generate, pending review, approve/reject/edit, feedback
- platform — OAuth/connectors (WeCom callback + connector; others may be mock), message listener
- contact — contacts, import, sync, lists
- scene — scene modes, activation
- message — conversations, history, stats, export jobs
- message-router — rules engine, inbound routing, logs, stats, simulate
- notification — REST + WebSocket gateway
- storage — MinIO upload/list/download
- audit — audit log query
- health — Terminus health checks
- common — guards, decorators, interceptors, pipes, shared DTOs
- config — env, data-source, redis, socket adapter, winston

Directory Structure:
src/
  main.ts, app.module.ts
  auth/
  user/
  style/          (+ processors/, services/, entities/, dto/)
  reply/
  platform/       (+ connectors/, controllers/, services/)
  contact/
  scene/
  message/        (+ processors/, services/)
  message-router/ (+ services/, entities/, dto/)
  notification/ (+ gateways/)
  storage/
  audit/
  health/
  common/
  config/         (+ migrations/ for some TypeORM migrations)
migrations/       (root-level TypeORM migrations)
test/             (*.e2e-spec.ts)
scripts/          (self-test shell/js)
docs/             (progress & specs; also architecture.md, api-spec.md, database-schema.md at repo root)

API & Dev:
- Global HTTP prefix: api/v1
- Swagger UI (non-production): /api-docs
- WebSocket path: see main.ts / NotificationGateway (socket.io under api/v1)

Current Gaps (high level):
- End-to-end verification: style job pipeline, inbound → router → reply → platform send
- Some platforms still mock; SMS may be mock
- Observability (metrics/tracing/Sentry) and e2e coverage still thin

Conventions:
- Tenant isolation: every query must filter by authenticated userId
- Follow .cursorrules at repo root; use TypeORM migrations, not synchronize for prod intent
purpose: AI-assisted social message automation: style learning, routing, reply generation with review, platform connectors. Backend-only; frontend is out of repo.
directoryStructure: src/{main.ts,app.module.ts,auth,user,style,reply,platform,contact,scene,message,message-router,notification,storage,audit,health,common,config}; migrations/; test/; scripts/; docs/; root: architecture.md, api-spec.md, database-schema.md
